sources.title: New Advances in Long-Context Agent Memory Systems
sources.excerpt: Recent work on agent memory architectures shows promising results for long-horizon task completion. Teams at major labs have been developing hierarchical memory systems that allow agents to maintain context over thousands of steps....
sources.relevance_note: Primary source describing the hierarchical memory architecture and its tiered approach to working, episodic, and semantic memory stores.

sources.title: Hierarchical Memory for AI Agents: A Breakthrough
sources.excerpt: A new paper demonstrates hierarchical memory architectures for AI agents that achieve state-of-the-art results on long-horizon task benchmarks. The system separates working memory from episodic and semantic memory stores....
sources.relevance_note: Corroborating source from a different outlet covering the same hierarchical memory research with additional benchmark details.
